seoTitle: Naval Base vs Neale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Naval Base vs Neale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Naval Base and Neale.
heading: Naval Base vs Neale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Naval Base, Western Australia and Neale, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Neale has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Naval Base (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Naval Base or Neale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Naval Base has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Neale scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Naval Base scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Neale scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Naval Base or Neale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Neale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
